---
title: "imageProcessDS"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(reticulate)
library(imager)
library(magick)
py_require(c("pillow"))
getwd()

zip_path = "C:\\Users\\jp10d\\Downloads\\images.zip"

source_python("imageProcessSupport.py")

load_images_from_zip(zip_path)

blank <- image_read("pathImages//blankBoard.png")

schedule <- read.csv("../shinyapp/data/week0/schedule.csv")

teams <- read.csv("teams.csv")$team

color1 = "#ef4444"
color2 = "#22c55e"
color3 = "#3b82f6"

for (team in teams){
    dir.create(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team), showWarnings = FALSE)
}

for (match_num in 1:nrow(schedule)) {
    if (file.exists(paste0("pathImages//blue//B", match_num, ".png"))){
        filter(match_num, 'B', paste0("pathImages//blue//B", match_num, ".png"), color1, color2, color3)
    }
    
    if (file.exists(paste0("pathImages//red//R", match_num, ".png"))){
        filter(match_num, 'R', paste0("pathImages//red//R", match_num, ".png"), color1, color2, color3)
    }
    
    for (i in 2:7){
        if (file.exists(paste0("pathImages//matches//", match_num ,"//B", i-4, ".png"))){
            team_assign(
                image = paste0("pathImages//matches//", match_num ,"//B", as.character(i-4), ".png"), 
                team = schedule[match_num,i], 
                color = 'B', 
                number = length(list.files(path = paste0("pathImages//teams//", as.character(schedule[match_num,i])), pattern = "^B[0-9]+")) + 1)
        }
        if (file.exists(paste0("pathImages//matches//", match_num ,"//R", i-1, ".png"))){
            team_assign(
                image = paste0("pathImages//matches//", match_num ,"//R", as.character(i-1), ".png"), 
                team = schedule[match_num,i], 
                color = 'R', 
                number = length(list.files(path = paste0("pathImages//teams//", as.character(schedule[match_num,i])), pattern = "^R[0-9]+")) + 1)
                #something in the line above me isn't working right
        }
    }
}

for (team in teams){
    
    team_image = blank
    empty = clear("pathImages//blankBoard.png")
    empty_annotated = image_read("pathImages//empty.png")
    
    for (img in list.files(paste0("pathImages//teams//", as.character(team)))){
        if(team == 449){
            print(img)
        }
        if(grepl("1.png", img, fixed = TRUE)){
            fill(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img), "#f82553")
        } else if(grepl("2.png", img, fixed = TRUE)){
            fill(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img), "#fb6640")
        } else if(grepl("3.png", img, fixed = TRUE)){
            fill(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img), "#f8c421")
        } else if(grepl("4.png", img, fixed = TRUE)){
            fill(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img), "#49cc5c")
        } else if(grepl("5.png", img, fixed = TRUE)){
            fill(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img), "#2c7ce5")
        } else if(grepl("6.png", img, fixed = TRUE)){
            fill(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img), "#6434e9")
        } else if(grepl("7.png", img, fixed = TRUE)){
            fill(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img), "#F06292")
        }
    }
    for (img in list.files(paste0("pathImages//teams//", as.character(team)))){
        image = image_read(paste0("pathImages//teams//", team, "//",img))
        empty_annotated = image_composite(empty_annotated, image, operator = "Over")
    }
    team_image = image_composite(team_image, empty_annotated, operator = "Over")
    image_write(team_image, paste0("pathImages//finals//", team, ".png"))
}


```
